description: Create a 3D construction in GeoGebra demonstrating the hexagonal cross-section of a cube. Construct a cube of side length 2 with one vertex at the origin (0,0,0) and the opposite vertex at (2,2,2). Create a plane that passes through the center of the cube (1,1,1) and is perpendicular to the space diagonal connecting (0,0,0) and (2,2,2). Generate the intersection polygon representing the cross-section and display its area using a text annotation. Save the project as 'cube_hexagon.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/
